task_completion.description: Verify the correct document is opened in a word processor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor application (e.g., Calligra Words or LibreOffice) is open, and the window title or tab shows 'triangle_fire_essay.odt'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the original bracketed inline markers have been removed from the text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Scan the visible text of the essay. Bracketed numbers such as [1], [2], through [8] should no longer be present in the main body.

task_completion.description: Verify that proper footnote indicators have been inserted into the text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for small superscript numbers (1, 2, 3, etc.) at the ends of sentences or clauses where the bracketed markers used to be.

task_completion.description: Verify that the footnote content at the bottom of the pages contains the correct bibliographic entries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom margin of the document pages. There should be a dedicated footnote section (often separated by a short line) containing the reference text with authors like 'Von Drehle', 'Stein', 'New York Times', 'McEvoy', or 'Greenwald'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the original 'References' section has been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the end of the document. The heading 'References' and the list of bibliographic entries should no longer appear in the main body text.

task_completion.description: Verify that the document has been saved after modifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application title bar should not show an 'unsaved changes' indicator (like an asterisk * next to the filename), or there is a visible save notification/action in the final screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical word processor rather than terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a GUI word processor (like Calligra Words) being interacted with, not just a terminal window running commands like 'sed' or 'awk'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the word processor's built-in footnote feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The footnotes should appear in the designated footer/footnote area at the bottom of the page, typically separated from the main text by a separator line, rather than just being manually typed at the end of the document text.

integrity.description: Verify that the main text of the essay was not accidentally deleted or corrupted.
integrity.visual_evidence: The main body of the essay should still contain readable paragraphs with keywords like 'Triangle Shirtwaist Company', 'Asch Building', 'Frances Perkins', and 'New Deal'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target document is '/home/ga/Documents/triangle_fire_essay.odt'. The original text contains exactly 8 inline markers ([1] through [8]) which must be removed. The essay contains keywords: 'Triangle Shirtwaist Company', 'Asch Building', 'Frances Perkins', 'International Ladies' Garment Workers' Union', 'Sullivan-Hoey Fire Prevention Law', 'Factory Investigating Commission', 'Washington Place', and 'New Deal'. The footnote content must be populated using the references section, which includes authors: 'Von Drehle', 'Stein', 'New York Times', 'McEvoy', and 'Greenwald'. The 'References' section must be completely removed from the final document.
